<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  module User :
    sig
      type id = int64
      type t = {
        userid : Types.User.id;
        fn : string;
        ln : string;
        avatar : string option;
        language : string option;
      }
    end
  module Action_link_key :
    sig
      type info = {
        userid : Types.User.id;
        email : string;
        validity : int64;
        expiry : CalendarLib.Calendar.t option;
        autoconnect : bool;
        action : [ `AccountActivation | `Custom of string | `PasswordReset ];
        data : string;
      }
    end
  module Group :
    sig
      type id = int64
      type t = { id : Types.Group.id; name : string; desc : string option; }
    end
end >>
